title: My subscription
description: Your VetSaaS plan, service status, and renewal dates.

alerts.ok: Your subscription is up to date. Check the next charge date to plan renewal.
alerts.warning: Renewal is coming soon. We recommend paying before the due date to avoid interruptions.
alerts.danger: Your subscription needs attention. Renew as soon as possible to restore full access.
alerts.muted: If you have questions about your plan or dates, contact Orvae support.

renew_hint: Payment is processed on Orvae's secure portal. Once confirmed, your access is extended automatically.
no_renewal_url: No payment link is configured yet. Contact support to renew your plan.
support: If you need to change plans or have a pending charge, contact the Orvae team.
